description: Create an interactive geometry demonstration of the Inscribed Angle Theorem in GeoGebra. Construct a circle centered at the origin (0, 0) with radius 3, featuring fixed points A at (3, 0) and B at (0, 3), and a moveable point C constrained to the circle's major arc. The demonstration must measure and display the inscribed angle ∠ACB and the central angle ∠AOB, and include a text annotation showing the relationship between these angles (e.g., "Central Angle = 2 * Inscribed Angle"). Save the completed construction as 'inscribed_angle.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
